question: [File: 'File Name: rest/service/tokenAllowanceService.js -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: getQuery()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a single request with both spender.id range filters and token.id range filters to force getQuery() to generate a 3-subquery UNION ALL path (lower+inner+upper all non-empty), causing the database to execute up to 3x the normal query work per request and increasing node CPU/IO consumption by over 30% without sending multiple requests?
